observable_summary: Article-native Al observable: backend free-electron DSF plus an Al-specific elastic/ion feature built from Cromer-Mann atomic form factors. The bound/core inelastic channel is shell-resolved and stays zero in the current benchmark window because |omega| < 72.6 eV remains below the first Al L-shell onset.
